graded_findings.rationale: The violation is marked locked:true, so policy requires it to remain blocking. Its evidence describes a prohibited security action that should stop merge.
The violation is marked locked:true, so policy requires it to remain blocking. Its evidence describes a prohibited security action that should stop merge.
The violation records a network send that drove the egress allowlist automaton into an error state. That is a substantive outbound-policy breach and should block merge.
